headerDisplay: Controls a Devialet Phantom over its local HTTP IP Control API (DOS 2.14+). Exposes the speaker in Apple Home as a Television accessory with selectable sources and volume.
footerDisplay: Volume is hard-clamped to **maxVolume** before being sent to the speaker. The Phantom gets very loud; keep this conservative.

name.title: Name
name.description: Accessory name shown in Apple Home.

ip.title: Speaker IP
ip.description: Static IP of the Phantom (use a DHCP reservation).

port.title: Port
port.description: HTTP port of the IP Control API (default 80).

pollInterval.title: Poll interval (seconds)
pollInterval.description: How often to read source/volume/play state from the speaker.

maxVolume.title: Max volume (safety cap)
maxVolume.description: All volume values are hard-clamped to this before being sent. Keep conservative.

defaultVolume.title: Default volume
defaultVolume.description: Volume to apply after a source switch / power-on when no last value is known.

restoreVolumeOnSourceSwitch.title: Restore volume on source switch
restoreVolumeOnSourceSwitch.description: The firmware resets volume to a fixed default on source switch. Re-apply the last known volume afterwards.

exposeVolumeAsLightbulb.title: Expose volume as a slider (Lightbulb)
exposeVolumeAsLightbulb.description: Adds a Lightbulb whose brightness is the volume, giving a true percentage slider in Apple Home.

volumeStep.title: Volume step
volumeStep.description: Increment used by the Remote widget up/down buttons.

sources.title: Sources to show
sources.description: Tick the sources you want to see in Apple Home. Leave all unticked to show every source.
